demographics.living_situation: lives at a private residence; alone at the time of the call

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The cut on my foot from two weeks ago is now red, swollen, and leaking pus, and I am so exhausted I can barely keep my eyes open.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The foot has got a lot worse in the last couple of days and I'm completely wiped out — I couldn't wait for a normal clinic appointment.

symptom_narrative.onset: the foot cut happened about two weeks ago and has never healed; it turned red, swollen and started leaking pus over the last day or two
symptom_narrative.duration: wound about 2 weeks, sharply worse over 48 hours; the tiredness, thirst and needing to wee a lot have crept up over about six months
symptom_narrative.character: the foot is painful, red, swollen and oozing; I feel drained and heavy all the time; my eyes have gone blurry and my feet feel like they have pins and needles
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the exhaustion is severe — I can hardly work — and the foot really hurts when I put weight on it
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the sore is on the sole of my right foot; the numbness and tingling is in both feet like I'm wearing socks; the blur is in both eyes
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the foot has been getting worse fast; the tiredness, thirst and weeing are there all the time and have slowly built up for months
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really — resting my foot helps the pain a bit
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: standing or walking on the foot; the tiredness is there no matter what I do
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: very thirsty and drinking a lot, passing urine much more than usual, blurred vision in both eyes, numbness and tingling in both feet, feeling run down and maybe a bit feverish
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: never had a wound that wouldn't heal like this before; no previous foot problems
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: limping badly and struggling to walk on the foot; too exhausted to do a full day's work

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: no medical conditions that I know of — I've never really been to the doctor much

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: none — I don't take any regular medicines

social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: not very active; hasn't paid much attention to diet
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: works on his feet; wears tight-fitting shoes; lives on his own and was by himself when he called

objective_data_offered.value: a sore about the size of a 5-cent coin on the sole of the right foot, red and puffy around the edges, leaking yellow pus, from a cut about two weeks ago
objective_data_offered.timing: shown on video during the call
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: phone-camera view only; the depth of the wound, how far the redness truly extends and whether deeper tissue or bone is involved cannot be judged from video
patient's own estimate, not a calibrated scale reading

objective_data_offered.value: says his feet feel numb and tingly like they are wrapped in socks, and he did not notice the original cut when it happened
